title: Extracting Phone Numbers
scenario: Write a prompt to extract all phone numbers mentioned in a passage of text, including country codes, area codes, and local numbers.
constraints: Must use the re library for regular expressions

evaluationCriteria.description: The code adheres to the specified programming language and library constraints.
The code accurately extracts all phone numbers mentioned in the passage, including country codes, area codes, and local numbers.
The code is well-structured, readable, and follows standard Python coding practices.
